senses.gloss: to go away, to leave, to depart
to perish, to die, to be destroyed
to abduct, to steal, to sweep away, to annihilate
to lead someone, to conduct someone, to take someone along
to think, to believe, to hold the view, to be of the opinion

examples.text: فأمّا الْبَرِيد ففيه خلاف وذهب قوم إلى أنه بالبادية اثنا عشر ميلا وبالشام وخراسان ستة أميال
examples.english: About the postal route there is disagreement. Folks believed that in the desert it is twelve miles and in Syria and Khorasan six miles.

senses.gloss: to escape, to slip, to lose sight of, to be forgotten
to ignore, to skip, to omit
to prepare to, to be about to

etymology.text:
ذَهَبَ
A Central Semitic innovation. Cognate with Hebrew זָהָב (zāhāḇ), Classical Syriac ܕܗܒܐ (dahbā), Old South Arabian 𐩹𐩠𐩨 (ḏhb).
